'''sothavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biacid|biacid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biacid|biacid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sothavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothavithi|sothavithi]] || [[word:sothaviji|sothaviji]] || [[word:sothavishi|sothavishi]] || [[word:sothaviki|sothaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothavuthuthu|sothavuthuthu]] || [[word:sothavujuju|sothavujuju]] || [[word:sothavushushu|sothavushushu]] || [[word:sothavukuku|sothavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothavuthu|sothavuthu]] || [[word:sothavuju|sothavuju]] || [[word:sothavushu|sothavushu]] || [[word:sothavuku|sothavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothavufthuf|sothavufthuf]] || [[word:sothavufjuf|sothavufjuf]] || [[word:sothavufshuf|sothavufshuf]] || [[word:sothavufkuf|sothavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothavethe|sothavethe]] || [[word:sothaveje|sothaveje]] || [[word:sothaveshe|sothaveshe]] || [[word:sothaveke|sothaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothavothotho|sothavothotho]] || [[word:sothavojojo|sothavojojo]] || [[word:sothavoshosho|sothavoshosho]] || [[word:sothavokoko|sothavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothavotho|sothavotho]] || [[word:sothavojo|sothavojo]] || [[word:sothavosho|sothavosho]] || [[word:sothavoko|sothavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothavofthof|sothavofthof]] || [[word:sothavofjof|sothavofjof]] || [[word:sothavofshof|sothavofshof]] || [[word:sothavofkof|sothavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothavïfthïf|sothavïfthïf]] || [[word:sothavïfjïf|sothavïfjïf]] || [[word:sothavïfshïf|sothavïfshïf]] || [[word:sothavïfkïf|sothavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothavïfthïfthïf|sothavïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:sothavïfjïfjïf|sothavïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:sothavïfshïfshïf|sothavïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:sothavïfkïfkïf|sothavïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothavïfthïf|sothavïfthïf]] || [[word:sothavïfjïf|sothavïfjïf]] || [[word:sothavïfshïf|sothavïfshïf]] || [[word:sothavïfkïf|sothavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothavïfthïf|sothavïfthïf]] || [[word:sothavïfjïf|sothavïfjïf]] || [[word:sothavïfshïf|sothavïfshïf]] || [[word:sothavïfkïf|sothavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothavæthæ|sothavæthæ]] || [[word:sothavæjæ|sothavæjæ]] || [[word:sothavæshæ|sothavæshæ]] || [[word:sothavækæ|sothavækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothavathatha|sothavathatha]] || [[word:sothavajaja|sothavajaja]] || [[word:sothavashasha|sothavashasha]] || [[word:sothavakaka|sothavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothavatha|sothavatha]] || [[word:sothavaja|sothavaja]] || [[word:sothavasha|sothavasha]] || [[word:sothavaka|sothavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothavafthaf|sothavafthaf]] || [[word:sothavafjaf|sothavafjaf]] || [[word:sothavafshaf|sothavafshaf]] || [[word:sothavafkaf|sothavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sothavasha|sothavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothavshësha|sothavshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothavrosha|sothavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothavmusha|sothavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothavyasha|sothavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothavnkshësha|gosothavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothavnkrosha|gosothavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothavnkmusha|gosothavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothavnkyasha|gosothavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sothathavasha|sothathavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothathavshësha|sothathavshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothathavrosha|sothathavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothathavmusha|sothathavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothathavyasha|sothathavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothathavnkshësha|gosothathavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothathavnkrosha|gosothathavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothathavnkmusha|gosothathavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothathavnkyasha|gosothathavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sethævasha|sethævasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sethævshësha|sethævshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sethævrosha|sethævrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sethævmusha|sethævmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sethævyasha|sethævyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosethævnkshësha|gosethævnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosethævnkrosha|gosethævnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosethævnkmusha|gosethævnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosethævnkyasha|gosethævnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sothfavasha|sothfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothfavshësha|sothfavshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothfavrosha|sothfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothfavmusha|sothfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothfavyasha|sothfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothfavnkshësha|gosothfavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothfavnkrosha|gosothfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothfavnkmusha|gosothfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothfavnkyasha|gosothfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
